description:
We’re here to make money simple.

Handy Finance is building highly automated lending, settlement, and servicing platforms that handle sensitive financial data and make real financial decisions. We’re looking for a DevOps / Platform Engineer to own the reliability, security, and delivery of our cloud platforms - from code to production, end-to-end.

This role sits across engineering, QA, and operations, ensuring our systems are deployable, testable, observable, and well-documented, and that changes are released safely in a regulated environment.




What You’ll Do

Build and operate secure, scalable Azure platforms supporting backend services and Salesforce-integrated systems

Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines that support automated builds, deployments, and testing

Own environment consistency across DEV, QA, UAT, Pre-Prod, and Production

Implement and maintain end-to-end testing pipelines, validating real workflows across systems

Partner with backend engineers and QA to ensure:

Core decisioning and settlement flows work end-to-end

Integrations, edge cases, and failure scenarios are covered

Ensure systems are observable and auditable, with monitoring, logging, and alerting

Implement strong security controls, secrets management, and access policies

Design and test rollback, recovery, and incident response processes

Prepare and maintain clear, accurate API documentation, including contracts, schemas, and versioning, to support internal teams and system integrations

Support reliable releases of policy-driven and AI-assisted services




What You’ll Bring

5+ years’ experience in DevOps, Platform, or Site Reliability Engineering

Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure

Proven experience with:

CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or similar)

Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Bicep, ARM)

Containerised and serverless workloads


Why Join Handy Finance?

Build platforms that matter – powering how Australians access credit, interact with finance, and manage their money

Be part of a high-impact on-site team – closely connected to decision-makers and product leadership

Competitive Salary – we reward great people doing great work

Ready to help shape the future of financial services in one of Australia’s fastest growing fin-techs?

Apply now and help Handy Finance redefine what smart financial services look like.
